HEG: Strong Q1 with 11% revenue growth, 29% EBITDA margin, and high capacity utilization above 90%
data.description:
Q1 FY 2027 saw strong profitability and margin expansion, with revenue up 11% year-over-year and EBITDA margin rising to 29%. Capacity utilization remained above 90%, and the company is well-positioned for long-term growth amid global EAF expansion and robust liquidity.

Based on

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

TransDigm appoints Irina Krasik to Board
data.description:
TransDigm appointed Irina Krasik to its Board of Directors, effective July 22, 2026.

IndividualIrina Krasik
RoleDirector
Type of ChangeAppointed
Effective DateJuly 22, 2026
ReasonNot disclosed
Replacement InfoNot disclosed
Background DetailsManaging Director at Stellex Capital Management since 2021; former Principal at Bregal Investments; >8 years at The Wicks Group; roles at The Carlyle Group and Merrill Lynch; MBA Harvard Business School; B.S. Finance Rutgers University
Board/Committee Role ChangesNot appointed to any Board committees

Original SEC Filing: TransDigm Group INC [ TDG ] - 8-K - Jul. 24, 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-powered summary. It may contain inaccuracies. Consider verifying important information with the source. Please note this summary is solely based on documents filed with the SEC.

CHTR: Revenue and net income declined, but mobile growth and network investments remained strong
data.description:
Revenue declined 1.7% year-over-year to $13.5 billion, with net income at $1.3 billion and Adjusted EBITDA down 4.3%. Mobile lines grew strongly, while Internet and video customers declined. Capital expenditures remained flat, and significant investments were made in network evolution and rural expansion.

Original document: Charter Communications, Inc. [CHTR] SEC 8-K Current Report — Jul. 24 2026

data.description:
